intro_para1: Cravings sometimes feel random. But most of the time, something quietly triggers them.
intro_para2: A mood, a place, a habit, or even a moment of boredom.
intro_para3: Let's investigate and see what might be behind this one.
urge_title: How strong is the urge right now?
urge_para1: Take a quick moment to check in with yourself.
urge_para2: Being honest helps the detective find better clues.
triggers_para1: Most cravings are connected to something happening around us or within us.
context_activity_q: What were you doing just before the urge appeared?
emotion_para2: Choose anything that matches your current mood.
summary_para1: You just captured an important clue.
summary_para2: The more triggers you notice, the easier it becomes to stay ahead of cravings.
patterns_para1: Your detective work is starting to reveal patterns.
patterns_para2: Here are some clues your entries have uncovered.
insight_stress: Stress shows up as a common trigger
insight_alone: Urges appear often when you are alone
insight_boredom: Boredom seems to fuel your cravings
insight_anxiety: Anxiety is linked to your urges
insight_social: Social pressure plays a role in your cravings
insight_routine: Habitual routines may be triggering you
insight_restless: Restlessness is connected to your cravings
insight_none: Keep logging — patterns will emerge over time
history_empty: No entries yet. Complete an investigation to see your history here.
